programmes.show_description: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.
Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programmes.show_name: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programmes.show_description: George attempts to bring the grandeur back to a Georgian town house in Cheshire that's been stripped of its original features, and tackles a 380-year-old Jacobean cottage.

programmes.show_name: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programmes.show_description: Janice says goodbye to some of her beloved sheep, Matt's makeover of the patio and seating area begins to take shape, and the goats venture to pastures new.

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: In Spain, Jo and Ken fling open their doors to the flamboyance of flamenco. In France, Jon and Angela turn a shed into a wedding venue, with themselves as guinea pigs.
...the Sun: As the enormity of the build sets in, work gets underway to make the place liveable before the family move in. And Jasmine visits a friend for some renovation inspiration. (Ep2)
Sonal and Tina can't wait to swap busy Birmingham for a new home on Wales's Gower Peninsula and a bolthole on the island of Corfu. Can Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton deliver their dream?
Sue and Tony want a holiday bolthole in the French city of Carcassonne. With a property already on their radar, can any of Craig Rowe's options for their £100k win them over?
Northamptonshire. Make-up artist Jules hopes that her Indian/Moroccan fusion menu and laid-back attitude will be the winning combination. (Ep1/5)
Northamptonshire. Funeral service manager Peter throws a 1920s dinner party. But his guests are put off by his bread and butter pudding, and there's a shock revelation from Jules. (Ep2/5)
Northamptonshire. Stephanie plans a menu of classics with a twist and a glamorous 'swishing' session. But will her nerves get the better of her? (Ep3/5)
Northamptonshire. Super-organised business planning manager Lauren runs her kitchen like a military operation and brings a few surprise guests to the table. (Ep4/5)
Northamptonshire. Chilled-out northerner Carl takes a relaxed approach to hosting on a night featuring a picture-perfect poser and a dessert disaster that has everyone in hysterics. (Ep5/5)

programmes.show_name: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programmes.show_description: ...List It: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back at Graham and Nardeth's worn-out Windsor home with a lacklustre layout. Did Kirstie's plan prevail, or did the list-it line-up win?

programmes.show_name: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programmes.show_description: George helps a couple whose Weymouth home was destroyed overnight by a flash flood, and revisits a couple in Chiswick to find out what's next on their demolition list.
...Less: In Nottingham, Emma and Matt's hectic schedules mixed with two energetic kids is a recipe for mealtime mayhem. Can they turn chaotic convenience into bountiful batching?
Scooby the Great Dane seeks a new recruit for the gang. It's a double date for the Davies family with a Labrador and German Shepherd. And is Fox the Pomeranian about to get lucky?
In the hillsides of stunning Sa Pa, Bill explores longstanding cultural traditions - plus mountain-top ice cream, the friendship of a buffalo and the healing properties of a bath. (Ep5)
Recorded live at Hammersmith Apollo, comedian Bill Bailey is furious and hilarious as he takes on popular culture, social media, celebrity, cheap shark-diving and more.

The Goggleboxers settle in for Celebrity Bake Off, The Dog House, Saturday Night Live UK, Britain's Got Talent, Celebrity Sabotage, BBC News on Easter eggs and more.
The epic adventure reality contest continues. The Predators ruthlessly round on one player and cracks form in a friendship. As politics and power plays kick in, who'll be culled next? (Ep4)
The epic adventure reality contest continues. Predator turns on Predator, but will it pay off? One player goes all in on their biggest threat, and a fiery clash sets rivalries alight. (Ep5)
The epic adventure reality contest continues. With five Predators and two Prey, the players face a brutal reset - and a shock decision delivers the biggest upset of the game so far. (Ep6)

Cankiz longs to fulfil her dream of living near Torrevieja in Spain, but her daughter wants to stay near her friends in Northamptonshire. Can they agree on where their new home should be?
Gary and Alison are looking for a rural holiday home in the Haute-Vienne area of central France. Can Laura Hamilton find them the perfect place for their budget of £100k?
Exeter. New Zealander and royalist Steve goes to town with a menu inspired by his homeland and regales his guests with patriotic tales. (Ep1/5)
Exeter. Music-mad foodie Richard is confident that he can impress his guests with his culinary know-how. And he hopes to dazzle one guest in particular... (Ep2/5)
Exeter. Self-assured PR bod Glen King aims to be the 'hostess with the mostest' and goes all out to impress, even co-ordinating her dishes with her surname! (Ep3/5)
